subcodes.first_line: In these days when in the heavens the hidden suns have dawned from the horizons of manifestation, and the effulgent rays of the Sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این ایام که در سموات ظهور شموس غیبیه از آفاق شهود طالع و لوامع تجلیات شمس
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @empty learning; false spirituality, @Manifestation of God as sun
